failedTests.name: Shows error UI when API is unreachable
failedTests.reason: hasErrorUI() returns false - no toast--error, error-boundary, or [role=alert] elements displayed when all APIs fail on reload

failedTests.name: Shows error UI when server returns 500 on session create
failedTests.reason: hasErrorUI() returns false - sessionStore.beginSession sets error but MeditationChat doesn't display it

failedTests.name: Shows error UI when server returns 500 on profile load
failedTests.reason: hasErrorUI() returns false - profileStore.loadProfile fails silently without showing toast

failedTests.name: Shows error UI when chat API returns 500
failedTests.reason: hasErrorUI() returns false - chat API 500 doesn't trigger error toast

failedTests.name: Shows timeout error when request times out
failedTests.reason: hasErrorUI() returns false - timeout doesn't trigger error toast

failedTests.name: Multiple rapid API failures show error UI
failedTests.reason: hasErrorUI() returns false - multiple API failures don't show error UI

failedTests.name: Page remains usable after encountering errors
failedTests.reason: hasErrorUI() returns false - error UI not displayed after errors

rootCause: Stores don't show error toasts when API calls fail. profileStore.loadProfile fails silently, sessionStore.beginSession sets error but MeditationChat doesn't display it, chat API errors don't show toast. The hasErrorUI() helper checks for .toast--error, .error-boundary, .meditation-chat__error[role=alert], .session-history__error[role=alert], [role=alert] - none of these are rendered because stores don't call toast.showError() when API calls fail.

blockers.issue: Stores don't show error toasts when API calls fail (500, network error, timeout)
profileStore.loadProfile fails silently, sessionStore.beginSession sets error but MeditationChat doesn't display it
Timeout errors don't trigger error toasts
